title: Smith Reveals Meeting with the US Heritage Foundation After Trump Win
author: David Falk
notes: Published in collaboration with DeSmog. Smith confirmed meeting with Heritage Foundation 'not long after the 2024 US election' — stated at Canada Strong and Free conference September 2025. Purpose: understand Trump policies and frame Alberta interests. The Tyee is Tier 2 (Desmog collab noted). Upgrades R-079. Anchors EVT-062. NOTE: meeting ~Nov 2024, revealed Sept 2025, article Oct 14 2025.
